offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of billing records with payment receipts.

automation_simplification_ideas: Create templates for common billing inputs
